name: Day Care Simulator
description: Daycare Baby Games is a fun & engaging daycare game where you get to experience the joy of taking care of babies in World Daycare! In this family game, you can babysit adorable babies. Join the fun in the exciting world of Tizi Town and learn the responsibilities that come with baby care, all while having a blast in this interactive family game. As a babysitter in Daycare Simulator, your job is to take care of the babies in the daycare center. You will have to feed them, change their diapers, help them sleep, and make sure they’re comfortable and happy. With the variety of baby games within the app, you’ll never run out of activities.
